name: company-discovery-actor
title: Company Discovery from Job Aggregators
description: Discovers companies with open positions via public ATS APIs (Greenhouse, Lever) and job aggregators (The Muse, Arbeitnow, Remotive). Outputs company name, job board URL, and actual open positions count.

maxCompaniesPerSource.title: Max companies per source
maxCompaniesPerSource.description: Maximum number of companies to discover from each source.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Which sources to query. Options: greenhouse, themuse, megaemployers, arbeitnow, remotive
